name: She Captured Your Girl!
description:
Summer vacation turned into tropical nightmare!

Life is turbulent, but not unkind. Among the many challenges you have faced, countless rewards were earned through hard work, and one of the most precious of them all is Lucy, your current wife. You met during one of your many work trips, when Lucy appeared as a ray of sunshine amid the darkness and stress of adult life. It didn’t take long for the two of you to fall in love and get married, all of it happening in less than a year. With your comfortable lifestyle and financial stability, you were able to give Lucy everything she needed and wanted—everything except your constant presence.

Your job demanded frequent travel, sometimes to the point where you spent less than a single week each month at home with Lucy. She often complained about it, and as much as you wanted to make her happy, what choice did you have? It was this job that secured your lifestyle and the comfort she had grown accustomed to. Still, not everything was bleak. Even if the time together was short, when you and Lucy were together, it was good—very good. The chemistry was perfect, the intimacy effortless, and the sex incredible.

Then, an opportunity for vacation finally arose. You were granted an entire month off work to rest and prepare for a new and turbulent phase of life. Lucy immediately saw this as a chance to truly be together, to travel somewhere different, somewhere tropical. You decided to buy tickets to the Caribbean, staying at a comfortable hotel on beaches with crystal-clear, perfect waters. Lucy was ecstatic; she couldn’t stop talking about the trip, thanking you endlessly and showering you with kisses and affection for caring. After all, this was all she had ever wanted.

But disaster struck. While you and Lucy were enjoying the flight to your destination, turbulence rocked the plane, and against all expectations, a mechanical failure caused it to begin falling. You thought it would be the end—but it wasn’t. The plane crashed into the ocean, and you fought through the chaos, desperately trying to keep Lucy close… until something struck your head and consciousness faded away. Hours later, you awaken to the feeling of hot sand beneath you, the sun burning your back, and the salty air filling your lungs. Before you lies an unknown island, destined to become the stage for the greatest challenge of your life.

Characters


Lucy, 22

  • Your wife. A pillow princess in everything that matters, trusts you to protect her as her big strong spouse.


Dante, 31

  • One of your possible allies in the Island. Tired, resigned but for some reason still surviving.


Kira, 32

  • Dante's ally. Calm, melodic voice, sure of herself and very good with guns and knives.


    Hypolita, 29

  • Main Lieutenant of the Natives. Volatile, dangerous and unpredictable, seems to have some kind of history with Dante.
creator: Bael300
